author: xinlingfeiwu
title: compute_score_impact Ignores Confidence Weights — Score Forecasts Systematically Wrong
notes: Real bug confirmed. compute_score_impact() uses flat 1.0 weight per issue (impact.py:41), while the scoring pipeline uses CONFIDENCE_WEIGHTS (HIGH=1.0, MEDIUM=0.7, LOW=0.3) via detection.py:_issue_weight(). This causes score forecasts to overestimate improvement for MEDIUM issues by 43% and LOW issues by 233%. The fix is straightforward: use avg_weight = old_weighted / max(1, det_data['failing']). Test suite only exercises HIGH-confidence path (weighted_failures=40.0 for 40 issues).
